rag_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure type consistency in binary expressions; left and right sides must be of the same type.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex to avoid unresolved references.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must maintain type safety and avoid introducing undefined or mismatched types.
Assignments in implementation scope should reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and must use valid AADL scope identifiers.
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare types using int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified names.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce type mismatches in binary expressions; ensure all operands are of compatible types.
Avoid referencing identifiers or types not present in the visible AADL model or its configured dependencies.
